podDescription: Hyperliquid perp trade dataset constructed from wallet 0xebe126adabe1a8f08d3ce53b45e7cc994ca14070's on-chain fills via the public Hyperliquid /info endpoint (userFillsByTime, 7d window). Source wallet: 0xebe126adabe1a8f08d3ce53b45e7cc994ca14070. Time span: 1779685825947..1779686859935 ms epoch (~17.23 minutes, 0.011967 days). Markets: xyz:BRENTOIL (Hyperliquid commodity perp via the xyz markets layer). Trade rows: 213 closing fills (each fill is a labeled trade row with market, direction, size, fill_price, outcome.pnl, verification.timestamp_ms + tx_hash). Signal taxonomy: {unclassified: OHLCV not available for xyz:BRENTOIL in this run's prefetched OHLCV set (BTC/ETH/SOL 1h only); per-trade indicator labels not derived without inventing readings the wallet didn't take}. Aggregate metrics: n_trades=213, win_rate=1.0, sharpe_ann=295747.86, max_drawdown_pct=0.0, max_drawdown_abs_usd=0.0, days_covered=0.011967, sum_pnl_usd=$48731.63, peak_pnl_usd=$48731.63, mean_return_per_trade=0.060481, std_return_per_trade=0.000521. Each trade row carries the HL fill tx hash (verifiable on hypurrscan.io and app.hyperliquid.xyz) so the dataset is independently auditable. Strategy class: ultra-HFT execution on a commodity perp — likely market-making or liquidation provision given 100% win-rate, all Close Short rows, and 17-minute concentrated activity.
